name: @lucky-agent/agent-openai-sdk
description: Brand-agnostic OpenAI Agents SDK backend. Boots an HTTP API (default port 6791) + sandbox-proxy server (default port 7791). Pure backend — no bundled frontend; pair with @ggui-samples/app-ggui-basic-web (or any MCP-Apps-spec frontend) via VITE_AGENT_ENDPOINT_URL. Real LLM via OPENAI_API_KEY. Not published.
